title: The Super Hero roll-six grants no-damage state

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 5-6, this creature cannot be damaged this turn.

effect.value: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 5-6, this creature cannot be damaged this turn.

plan.title: The Super Hero roll-six grants no-damage state
